evals.prompt: I found a bug in cogni-trends where the scouting report duplicates entries
evals.expected_output: Creates a GitHub issue with the bug label, assigns it to the cogni-trends plugin repository, includes reproduction context

evals.prompt: Show me all open issues for the insight-wave ecosystem
evals.expected_output: Lists open issues across insight-wave plugins, grouped by plugin or label, with status and assignee

evals.prompt: I want to request a feature for cogni-portfolio to support multi-market propositions
evals.expected_output: Creates a GitHub issue with the enhancement label for cogni-portfolio, captures the feature description and use case
